calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Solomua V. Solomua 415-286-2646 Plaintiff in Pro Per appears late.
Susan Kawala, Deputy City Attorney 415-554-3846 of San Francisco for Defendant through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. The matter is recalled at 9:44 am due to Plaintiff's late appearance. Plaintiff submits a declaration in Open Court. The Court announces an Opposition has not been filed. Plaintiff argues. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NATHAN BERNARD, DEXTER TSANG'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Defendants Nathan Bernard and Dexter Tsang's demurrer to all causes of action in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiff Solomua V. Solomua is sustained without leave to amend as to all causes of action. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
